detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.openTrading() (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#579-605):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#589)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#591)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#591)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#601)
	GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.tradingOpen (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#287) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.openTrading() (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#579-605)

detectors.description:

		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#523-535)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#497)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#573)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#507)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#661)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#641)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#643)
	GreatestOfAllTokensClassic._rOwned (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#245) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic._takeTeam(uint256) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#655-663)
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#637-651)
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.balanceOf(address) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#363-367)
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.constructor() (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#313-327)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#507)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#669)
	GreatestOfAllTokensClassic._rTotal (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#261) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic._getCurrentSupply() (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#761-771)
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#667-673)
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.constructor() (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#313-327)
	- GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GreatestOfAllTokensClassic.sol#419-427)
